title: Next.js 16 Migration & Season Trajectory 2.0
changes: Migrated Middleware to the new Next.js 16 Proxy convention (src/proxy.ts)
Resolved build failures by fixing deprecated request.ip API usage
Season Trajectory 2.0: Added Team Value tracking, Chip markers (WC, BB, TC, FH), and FPL Average benchmarks to the history chart
Merged origin/main branch features into master for unified production readiness
Added Transfer Optimizer UI and automated Transfer Evaluation cron job
Updated documentation to reflect new architecture and features

title: Consistency Pass, DGW UX, and Promotion Docs
changes: Standardized player visuals to current-season club shirts for a more consistent dashboard presentation
Completed double gameweek rendering in the fixture ticker and added a 'no DGW/BGW in next 5 GWs' indicator
Updated dashboard summary cards to show official/provisional/live GW score lifecycle and team value
Refreshed README and added product, architecture, and promotion-copy documentation
Applied additional UI cleanup for fixture and avatar presentation

title: Player Image Freshness & Visual Cleanup
changes: Added transfer-aware stale image filtering via /api/v1/player-photo
Use team_join_date intelligence: hide stale photos only for recently transferred players
Centralized player image URL routing through shared helper
Removed club-colored avatar border accents for a cleaner neutral presentation
Retained cache-busting and graceful transparent fallback for missing/broken images

title: Phase 3 Completion: Advanced Analytics
changes: Official Rank Integration: Dynamic toggle for Live vs. Official GW rank status
Enhanced Season Trajectory: Dual-axis Points/Rank line charts with log scaling
AI Captaincy Adviser: Integrated expected points (xP) analysis into the pitch
Fixture Heat-mapping: Club highlighting and form-based color coding in ticker
Refined Transfer Impact: Sorted analysis of hits vs. points gained
Hotfix: Resolved RankProjection dashboard build error

title: Squad Coverage Hotfix
changes: Include Bench players in Fixture Difficulty Ticker
Added visual 'Bench' separator to fixture table

title: Analytics Phase 3 & 4
changes: Real-time Mini-League Standings (Live rank shifts)
Live Rank Projection (Overall rank deltas)
Fixture Difficulty Ticker (Next 5 GW per player)
Enhanced Transfer Analyser (Sorting, Chips, Pts Impact)
Supabase Database Integration for full historical sync

title: Infrastructure Hub
changes: Next.js App Router migration
CI/CD Pipeline with GitHub Actions & Vercel
Automated regression testing suite
Glassmorphism UI foundation

title: MVP Launch
changes: Initial FPL Dashboard release
Live Squad Pitch view
Basic Team ID authentication
